chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-912 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 3605/24 3.For hearing of main case 30-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** On 16.04.2025, following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 30.04.2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for the petitioner”. Today, neither petitioner nor his counsel is in attendance; no intimation is received so far, which shows that the petitioner and his counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
